name_cn:
Top-tier replica, complete packaging
❤️❤️RIDER Backpack❤️❤️
Beige and Black Oversized Oblique Print
This Rider backpack features a simple style and a classic academic look full of vitality. Crafted from beige and black oversized Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the classic Dior pattern with smooth calfskin details and a front Dior logo to elevate the look. Continuing the classic design, it features exquisite details such as a double-zipper closure, a large front zip pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap, making it an ideal choice for daily outfits.
Beige and Black Oversized Oblique Print
Front metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior embossed with Dior logo
Double-zipper closure
Adjustable padded shoulder strap
Leather top handle
Back of bag reinforced with quilted technical knit fabric, embossed with Dior logo
Dimensions: 30 x 42 x 15 cm (L x H x W)
Code: 5410
